text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The history and future of Umamusume. And the
present. To think I'd be in such an article.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look. Your name's here too, Trainer. Well, of
course it is, since you've been with me from the
start.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There are a lot of statistics in here as well. Not
that I really have the head for them—I just run.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to this magazine, it'll be like everyone
from my hometown can have me right next to
them.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'll have to do even better. I want to make
it into a lot more articles.
